title: notifications core — product analytics events
description: User-facing analytics events for the product analytics sink. Distinct from metrics.json (OpenTelemetry / ops signals). These feed engagement funnels + preference change patterns. All events respect the user's analytics-consent tier — events with `consent_required: analytics` are dropped for users who haven't consented.

events.name: Notification Sent
events.description: Fired when NotificationSent event emits — provider accepted the handoff.

events.name: Notification Delivered
events.description: Fired when NotificationDelivered event emits — provider confirmed delivery.

events.name: Notification Seen
events.description: Fired when a user marks an in-app notification seen. Powers unseen-count → seen conversion funnel.

events.name: Preference Changed
events.description: Preference change events — functional consent because preferences are essential to service delivery, not marketing insight. Tracks opt-out patterns for the product team.

events.name: Digest Delivered
events.description: Fired when DigestDelivered event emits — measures batching effectiveness.

events.name: Inbox Opened
events.description: Fired when the user opens the inbox screen. Front-end origin — dashboard SPA calls this on mount.

events.name: Unsubscribed
events.description: Fired on one-click unsubscribe. Functional consent — it's a service action, not marketing.
